Alex Nguyen

Managing Director & Co-founder

Visionary but grounded Relationship-focused Calm under pressure Data-driven decision maker Technical credibility builder

Areas of Expertise

  • Business strategy and vision
  • Company history and culture
  • Enterprise IT strategy
  • WA mid-market business landscape
  • Key client relationships
  • Vendor relationship management
  • Financial overview and growth planning
  • IT governance frameworks

For Other Topics

  • Operations: speak with Priya Sharma
  • Security: speak with Marcus Webb
  • Finance: speak with Tanya Brooks
  • Hr: speak with Jordan Reeves
  • Architecture: speak with Liam Foster
  • Servicedesk: speak with Sam Okoro
